summary: Full regression pass on maligeeAi after GitHub sync. Backend: 24/24 pytest cases passed covering auth (signup/login/me), builds (free/paid/edit/deploy), mock payment, waitlist, showcase/features/stats/pricing, and AI chat (Emergent LLM GPT-4o). Frontend: end-to-end Playwright test verified landing page load, protected route redirect, signup, first free build creation, second $10 build + mock payment, AI chat real response, logout/login round trip.
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements (auth form inputs, submit buttons, New Build, Pay $10, Deploy, chat send, logout) to make future automated tests more robust. Currently tests rely on text/type selectors which are brittle.

OPTIONAL: Landing page waitlist form is inside a modal in FooterSection (triggered by a button) — backend endpoint tested & works, modal exists in code; consider adding a direct inline waitlist field in the hero for better conversion if desired.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~613 lines — approaching size threshold; consider splitting into routers (auth, builds, chat, landing) for maintainability.
JWT_SECRET falls back to a hardcoded default — acceptable for dev but ensure production always sets JWT_SECRET via env.
In-memory `chat_sessions = {}` dict declared but never used; safe to remove.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection everywhere — good.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds showcase/features/stats on first GET. Test user created via signup; 2 builds (1 free + 1 mock_paid) attached.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 API endpoints healthy. Regression pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py generates unique user per run so it's idempotent. AI chat uses Emergent LLM key (GPT-4o) and returns real responses. Mock payment endpoint sets payment_status='mock_paid' — this is intentional per user (real Stripe TBD). No data-testid attributes in frontend — Playwright tests must use text/type/role selectors.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Everything works end-to-end after the GitHub codebase sync.
